creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2009-12-14 21:03:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/mk-configure   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  mk-configure is a lightweight replacement for GNU autotools, written in bmake
  (portable version of NetBSD make) and POSIX shell. mk-configure also provides
  standalone mkc_check_xxx scripts that can be used without bmake.
  
  WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/mk-configure/
  
  PR:             ports/139295
  Submitted by:   Mikolaj Golub <to.my.trociny@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3712    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/devel/mk-configure/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/mk-configure/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/mk-configure/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/devel/mk-configure/pkg-plist (new)
